title: Concept4u Black Paper Table Cloth 90 x 90cm - 2 PACK Disposable Black Paper Table Cover Square Party Table Cover Occasions Baby Shower, Wedding, Birthday, Halloween, Xmas, Christmas Decorations
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: ✅ DOUBLE VALUE PACK – 2 DISPOSABLE TABLE COVERS : Each pack includes two paper tablecloths, each measuring 90cm x 90cm, ensuring you can cover multiple tables or keep a spare for unexpected spills. Perfect for effortless party preparation! Available in Black, Dark Blue, Dark Green, Dark Yellow, Gold, Ivory, Pink, Purple, Red, Silver, and White, making it easy to match any party theme or decoration style.

✅ EASY CLEANUP – NO WASHING OR IRONING REQUIRED : Say goodbye to laundering and ironing! After your event, simply gather and dispose of these table covers for a quick and stress-free cleanup, allowing you to focus on enjoying the occasion.

✅ PERFECT FOR CELEBRATIONS & DECORATIONS : Enhance your birthday parties, baby showers, weddings, Halloween, Christmas, or catering events with these festive and practical tablecloths. Ideal for children’s tables, dessert tables, or gift tables.

✅ VERSATILE & SPILL-PROOF DESIGN : Protect your tables from spills, stains, and messes while adding a stylish and neat look to your event. Great for indoor and outdoor use, making it a must-have for any gathering.

Color May Vary : Please note that the color of the paper tablecloth may slightly vary due to different production batches, lighting conditions, screen settings, and digital images. the actual product color may appear different. However, we ensure the same high-quality material and performance in every pack.
description: Product Description Generous Size for Square Tables :- The 90cm x 90cm size ensures this tablecloth provides ample coverage for most square tables. Whether hosting a small gathering or a larger event, this tablecloth offers the perfect size to protect your surfaces and create a stylish base for your party decorations. Convenient Cleanup :- Elevate your party atmosphere while simplifying post-event cleanup with this disposable paper tablecloth. Measuring 90cm x 90cm, it offers ample coverage for square tables, protecting your surfaces from spills and messes. Once the party's over, discard the tablecloth, eliminating the need for extensive cleaning or laundering. Creates a Fun and Festive Atmosphere :- Transform your ordinary tables into a vibrant and celebratory space with this colorful paper tablecloth. It adds a touch of whimsy and fun to your party décor, setting the stage for a memorable and enjoyable event for you and your guests. Lightweight and Portable :- The lightweight and compact design of this paper tablecloth makes it easy to transport. Whether hosting a party at home or taking the tablecloth to another venue, it can be conveniently stored and carried without hassle. Multiple Colors :- With various color options, you can find a tablecloth that perfectly complements your chosen party theme. This allows you to personalize your party décor and create a cohesive and visually appealing atmosphere. Ideal for Indoor and Outdoor Use :- This paper tablecloth is suitable for indoor and outdoor events. Whether celebrating inside your home or hosting a party on your patio, this versatile tablecloth protects your surfaces from spills and messes in any setting. Enjoy the convenience and stylish decoration it offers, regardless of your party location. Disposable Design :- The disposable nature of this tablecloth eliminates the need for washing or storing bulky linens. This makes it a hygienic and convenient option for any event. Simply enjoy the convenience of a clean tablecloth for your gathering and discard it afterwards, saving you time and effort. Durable Paper Construction :- Despite being disposable, this paper tablecloth is surprisingly durable. It can withstand minor spills and messes throughout your party without easily tearing or becoming unusable. This ensures your table remains protected while providing a stylish base for your food and decorations. Perfect for Birthday Parties :- This versatile paper tablecloth is ideal for various occasions. Liven up birthday parties, catering events, baby showers, or even wedding receptions with a touch of color and style. The disposable nature makes it perfect for events where convenience and quick cleanup are essential.
